Stimulates Hair Growth 
The Ayurvedic formulation is designed to stimulate hair follicles, promoting the growth of new and healthier hair strands. 
Reduces Hair Fall 
Amla, Brahmi, and Bhringraj are known for their ability to strengthen hair roots, minimizing hair fall and breakage. 
Deep Hair Nutrition 
Penetrates deep into the hair shaft to provide essential nutrients, ensuring overall hair health from the roots to the tips. 
Natural 
Free of Parabens, SLS, and Toxins. Made using the highest grade natural and organic ingredients.

description: Cashmir Cashmir Isabghol – Premium Psyllium Husk is a natural and effective daily fiber supplement made from 100% pure and sun-dried psyllium husk. This natural digestive support formula helps maintain a healthy digestive system and supports smooth bowel movement without harsh chemicals. The finely processed premium psyllium husk easily mixes with water, milk, juice, or curd, making it simple for regular use. It is free from artificial colors, additives, and preservatives, making it a safe choice for men and women. This 100% pure isabghol is commonly used to help with constipation relief, stomach cleansing, gut health support, and improving digestion naturally. The lightweight and fresh husk absorbs water quickly and forms a smooth texture for comfortable consumption. Suitable for daily wellness routines, sun-dried psyllium husk is a trusted source of dietary fiber that helps support digestive balance and overall stomach comfort.c

Finely Sieved for Maximum Quality: Soft, fluffy texture and fast-acting fiber that absorbs water quickly for comfortable consumption
Grown in Kashmir: Harvested from nutrient-rich soils and clean Himalayan air for superior quality psyllium husk
Traditional Sun-Drying Method: No heat processing, retaining natural fiber strength and effectiveness for digestive wellness
Vegan and Gluten-Free: Suitable for all diets and lifestyles including plant-based and gluten-sensitive individuals
Natural Digestive Support Formula: Helps maintain smooth bowel movement and supports overall stomach comfort without using harsh ingredients or chemicals

Suitable for Men and Women: Natural psyllium husk supplement for adults looking for digestive care, stomach cleansing support, and daily fiber intake improvement

breadCrumbs: Health & Personal Care > Diet & Nutrition > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Minerals > Zinc

items.title: Ingredients:
items.text: Dandelion Roots

description: Cashmir Biotech brings you a reliable and safe way to meet your daily mineral needs with our premium herbal iron supplement. Our carefully formulated dandelion tablets provide a gentle, plant-based iron source that is perfect for your everyday wellness routine. Benefits of our Natural Supplement Adding this natural iron supplement to your daily diet supports healthy energy levels and overall physical well-being. Unlike synthetic options, our ayurvedic iron tablets are highly digestible and do not cause that heavy or uncomfortable feeling in your stomach. Every serving offers a rich blend of essential nutrients like iron, calcium, magnesium, and zinc for excellent daily nutritional support. Daily Uses and Dosage Taking this iron supplement for men and women is very simple and fits easily into your busy lifestyle. The recommended usage is just two tablets per day for an adult person. Regular intake of these pure Taraxacum officinale leaf tablets ensures that your body gets pure herbal goodness to maintain daily wellness and balance. Product Key Features This completely vegan iron supplement is crafted with strict quality standards to give you the best results. Each bottle contains 200 tablets, providing you with long-lasting value for your health. The formulation contains zero artificial colours, added sugars, harsh preservatives, or animal products. We provide a very clean and pure herbal dietary supplement that is completely safe for daily, non-medicinal consumption.
features: Cashmir Biotech brings pure dandelion tablets made from authentic Taraxacum officinale leaf for daily wellness.
Key Feature (Vegan): This iron supplement contains zero artificial colours, sugars, preservatives, or animal products.
Main Benefit (Digestion): Enjoy a gentle, plant-based iron source that digests easily without causing heavy stomach discomfort.
Target Audience: A safe and highly effective natural iron supplement perfectly formulated for both men and women.
Health Benefit: Regular intake of this herbal iron supplement naturally supports healthy energy levels and physical balance.
Product Quantity: Each bottle gives you 200 dandelion tablets, providing a long daily supply of this natural iron supplement.
